arts.ttl: Liverpool given 'difficult' Alexis Mac Allister injury update from Argentina boss
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister has joined up with the Argentina squad despite coming off in Liverpool's Premier League win at Crystal Palace on Sunday

arts.ttl: Argentina boss Lionel Scaloni provides Alexis Mac Allister, Lionel Messi fitness updates
arts.sum: Argentina head coach Lionel Scaloni provides a fitness update on Alexis Mac Allister and Lionel Messi ahead of Thursday's World Cup qualifier with Venezuela.

arts.ttl: Hurricane could hamper Argentina's travel plans
arts.sum: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni expressed concern on Tuesday over his team's ability to travel for their World Cup qualifying match against Venezuela on Oct. 10 in Maturín, Venezuela.
